title: Cyperus neocooperi

intro: Cyperus neocooperi, also known as Cooper's flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used to support immune function and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Cyperus neocooperi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Cooper's flatsedge include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and digestive problems.
